creator: no-reply@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 199009
graphics/zathura-pdf-mupdf (WIP!)

I noticed other zathura ports install their metainfo into share/appdata instead of share/metainfo, so I added the thing that does that here as well.

The new eversion can not find mupdf yet again:

meson.build:23:0: ERROR:  C library 'mupdf-third' not found

and I have no idea how to fix it...
